allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\Users\\berletzis\\Source\\Repos\\Ybridio.ERP\\Ybridio.WinUI\\obj\\x64\\Debug\\net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win-x64\\output.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.MSBuildLogEntries | Where-Object { $_.ErrorCode -ne "" -or $_.Message -match "error|Error|WMC" } | Select-Object File, LineNumber, Message | Format-List)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\Users\\berletzis\\Source\\Repos\\Ybridio.ERP\\Ybridio.WinUI\\obj\\x64\\Debug\\net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win-x64\\output.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.MSBuildLogEntries | Where-Object { $_.Message -match "WMC[0-9]|cannot be|not found|does not|invalid|Failed|fail" } | Select-Object File, LineNumber, Message | Format-List | Out-String -Width 300)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\Users\\berletzis\\Source\\Repos\\Ybridio.ERP\\Ybridio.WinUI\\obj\\x64\\Debug\\net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win-x64\\output.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.MSBuildLogEntries | Where-Object { $_.File -ne "" } | Select-Object File, LineNumber, Message | Format-List | Out-String -Width 300 | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\Users\\berletzis\\Source\\Repos\\Ybridio.ERP\\Ybridio.WinUI\\obj\\x64\\Debug\\net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0\\win-x64\\output.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.MSBuildLogEntries | Where-Object { $_.Message -notmatch "perfXC|Marker" } | Select-Object File, LineNumber, Message | Format-List | Out-String -Width 300)
